message:
feat(grpc): add gzip frame compression/decompression with flate2

- Add gzip_frame_compress/gzip_frame_decompress behind compression feature
- Add with_gzip_frame_codec() convenience on FramedCodec
- Add frame_compressor()/frame_decompressor() on CompressionEncoding
- Add from_header_value() parser on CompressionEncoding
- Add send_compression/accept_compression to ServerConfig/ServerBuilder
- Add 5 tests for gzip roundtrip, bomb protection, empty, invalid input
- Re-export FrameCompressor/FrameDecompressor and gzip functions from grpc mod

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
